title: Local Particle Controls
summary: Adds a Local Particles section in the Style tab, letting each user set their own private particle overlay in the messages area. Settings persisted in localStorage.

changes.description: Added <div id="styleParticleSection"> placeholder in the Style tab HTML.
Calls loadParticleSection(uid) at the end of the Style tab render pass.

loadParticleSection(uid): renders type picker (none/sparkle/snow/bubble/firefly/dust), colour, count, size, speed, opacity, blur controls. Apply saves to localStorage and calls _applyLocalParticles. Clear removes saved config and destroys canvas.
_applyLocalParticles(uid): reads cp2p_particles_{uid} from localStorage and spawns a particle canvas on #messages using _spawnParticleCanvas. Destroys any previous canvas for the same key first.
Calls _applyLocalParticles(session.userId) on every room join to restore the user's preferred particle overlay.
